subcodes.first_line: O ye daughters of the Herald of the Covenant! The candle of the horizons shineth with the light of servitude at the threshold of the Sun of Truth, illumining both East and West [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنات منادی میثاق شمع آفاق بنور عبودیت در آستان شمس حقیقت روشن و شرق و غرب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
